texto: Many a soul will turn back to accustomed marshlands of defeat rather than brave the fogs of frustration
autor: but the mountain peaks rise high above the rain and gloom.
explicacao: Citação de but the mountain peaks rise high above the rain and gloom. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Many a soul will turn back to accustomed marshlands of defeat rather than brave the fogs of frust…” articula reflexao, v-raymond-edman, accustomed em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
